zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Audley於1220年6月1日出生在英國斯塔福爾時，她的父親Henry De Audley45歲，母親Bertrade Mainwaring23歲。她於大約1241年與Henry Touchet在英國斯塔福爾奧德利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1278年11月10日之後在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma de Audley于1220年6月1日出生在英国斯塔福爾时，她的父亲Henry De Audley45岁，母亲Bertrade Mainwaring23岁。她于大约1241年与Henry Touchet在英国斯塔福爾奧德利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1278年11月10日之后在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Audley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Audley was born on 1 June 1220, in Staffordshire, England, her father, Henry De Audley, was 45 and her mother, Bertrade Mainwaring, was 23. She married Henry Touchet about 1241, in Audley, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 10 November 1278, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de Audley est née le 1 juin 1220, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry De Audley, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Bertrade Mainwaring, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Touchet environ 1241, à Audley, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée après 10 novembre 1278, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de Audley am 1. Juni 1220 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry De Audley 45 und ihre Mutter Bertrade Mainwaring 23. Sie hat um 1241 in Audley, Staffordshire, England Henry Touchet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb nach 10. November 1278 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Audley è nata il il 1 giugno 1220 nel Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Henry De Audley, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Bertrade Mainwaring, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Henry Touchet circa 1241, nel Audley, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 10 novembre 1278, nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Audleyが1220年6月1日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry De Audleyは45歳，母Bertrade Mainwaringは23歳であった。約1241年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアウドリーでHenry Touchetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1278年11月10日以後にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Audley(이)가 1220년 6월 1일 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry De Audley(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertrade Mainwaring(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1241년 영국 스태퍼드실르 오들리에서 Henry Touchet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1278년 11월 10일 이후 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.1 June 1220–after 10 November 1278: 1 de junho de 1220–após 10 de novembro de 1278
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Audley nasceu em 1 de junho de 1220, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry De Audley, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Bertrade Mainwaring, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Touchet aproximadamente 1241, em Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu após 10 de novembro de 1278, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Audley родилась 1 июня 1220 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry De Audley было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertrade Mainwaring, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Touchet около 1241 г. в местности аудли, стаффордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после 10 ноябрь 1278 г. в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma de Audley nació el 1 de junio de 1220, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry De Audley, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Bertrade Mainwaring, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Henry Touchet aproximadamente 1241, en Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió después de 10 de noviembre de 1278, en Inglaterra.
